text.title: Elicitation Techniques Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the elicitation-techniques methodology end-to-end.

step.name: plan
step.action: Pick techniques per source class; schedule with consent + PII policy.

step.name: collect-consent-and-pii-rules
step.action: Sign consent; pre-tag PII categories; brief stakeholders.

step.name: run-sessions
step.action: Execute each technique per its template; capture typed artifact.

step.name: triangulate
step.action: Synthesise REQ stubs citing ≥2 distinct technique sessions.

step.name: commit
step.action: Commit to version control; link from requirements documentation.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
